a:r.a:t: Receivables Management, Collections Management, Aging Analysis
CFOs, Financial Controllers, and AR/Collections Leadership.

This use case addresses the challenge of managing accounts receivable by shifting from reactive to proactive operations. It provides a unified, real-time view of AR, leveraging ML to predict payment behavior, prioritize collections, and ultimately reduce Days Sales Outstanding and improve cash flow.
As a CFO, I can view a single dashboard with real-time KPIs like DSO and overdue trends, enabling me to make faster, data-driven decisions about working capital.
Automates AR aging and prioritizes collections using predictive risk scores to enable proactive cash planning.
Shifts AR teams from manual, reactive tasks to strategic risk mitigation and complex dispute resolution.
Centralized, self-service analytics with interactive dashboards, significantly reducing reliance on IT.
Unified architecture utilizing SAP Datasphere (integration), SAP Databricks (predictive ML), and SAP Analytics Cloud (drill-down).
A single source of truth delivering real-time KPIs, predictive payment insights, and invoice-level drill-downs.
Centralized semantic layer in SAP Datasphere ensuring consistent data definitions and reliable KPIs across the organization.
Start with the main SAC dashboard to show key health KPIs at a glance (DSO, Total Overdue, On-time payment rate).
Drill into dynamic aging views to analyze forecasted overdue amounts, utilizing ML to identify top contributors to at-risk buckets and assess their on-time payment likelihood.
Navigate to the "Collections Worklist" to show a prioritized list of customers based on ML-driven risk scores, demonstrating how collection efforts are focused.
Use the "Just Ask" feature to ask a natural language question like, "Show top 15 customers by amount with late payment" to highlight the ease of ad-hoc analysis.
